commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=cc4aee700101e17fd105cf42e826ed1254b4917d)
commands.review_summary:
The branch extracts ACP translator session-list/replay and manager backend-failover helpers, splits ACP manager/translator tests, updates test lane/shard planning, and adds small current-main CI drift fixes.

PR surface: Source +540, Tests -91, Other +22. Total +471 across 29 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows the PR head adds `manager.turn-results.test.ts` to regular unit-fast while that suite calls a helper that mutates `OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR` and shared task registries; I did not run it because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A narrow automated repair is available: move the task-state turn-results suite out of parallel unit-fast and update lane tests as needed.

target.title: refactor: clean up ACP translator and manager tests
target.body:
## Summary
- Extract ACP translator session-list and replay helpers with focused tests, and split the large translator bridge coverage into targeted files.
- Extract ACP manager backend failover decisions into a focused helper with tests.
- Split the monolithic ACP manager test coverage into shared harness plus focused failover, runtime-config, runtime-handle, and turn-result suites.
- Rebase onto latest main and fix current CI drift: Vite hook type narrowing, browser redactor dynamic-entry deadcode allowlist, explicit narrowing for the retired WebChat migration value, and the gateway live-shard expected list.
- Move ACP manager task-state test setup out of control-plane helpers so task registry boundary tests stay clean.
- Split the gateway runtime-state CI shard into smaller gateway-server shards so one remote file cannot stall the lane for 15 minutes.

## Verification
- `pnpm test src/tasks/task-boundaries.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.turn-results.test.ts ui/src/ui/control-ui-vite-config.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/browser-redact.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm test src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.runtime-handles.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.turn-results.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.runtime-config.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.failover.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.backend-failover.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm test src/acp/translator.session-rate-limit.test.ts src/acp/translator.final-snapshots.test.ts src/acp/translator.prompt-size.test.ts src/acp/translator.session-config.test.ts src/acp/translator.session-setup.test.ts src/acp/translator.session-snapshot.test.ts src/acp/translator.tool-streaming.test.ts src/acp/translator.session-list.test.ts src/acp/translator.replay.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm test test/scripts/test-live-shard.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm test test/scripts/ci-node-test-plan.test.ts test/scripts/test-live-shard.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- exact old remote runtime-state shard command via `OPENCLAW_VITEST_INCLUDE_FILE=... pnpm exec node scripts/test-projects.mjs test/vitest/vitest.gateway-server.config.ts`
- `pnpm deadcode:unused-files`
- `pnpm check:test-types`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `pnpm tsgo:prod`
- `pnpm lint:core`
- `pnpm run test:extensions:package-boundary:compile`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` clean, no accepted/actionable findings after the boundary cleanup and latest-main CI fixes

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: internal ACP refactor only; runtime/session behavior intended unchanged while ownership and tests are split into smaller surfaces. Also includes latest-main CI fixes needed for the PR merge commit.
Real environment tested: local macOS checkout, Node/pnpm repo wrappers.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: focused ACP manager tests, focused ACP translator tests, task boundary regression test, UI Vite/redactor tests, live-shard tooling test, CI node-plan tooling test, old gateway runtime-state shard repro, unused-file deadcode check, test typecheck, core/prod typecheck, core lint, extension package-boundary compile, Codex autoreview.
Evidence after fix: all listed local commands passed; PR CI rerun is pending after the latest force-push.
Observed result after fix: ACP manager and translator focused suites pass after the new helper/test splits; task registry boundary test stays clean; UI and latest-main type/shard drift are fixed; gateway runtime-state CI lane is split while preserving exact file coverage; autoreview reports no actionable findings.
What was not tested: full `pnpm check:changed` locally because local Crabbox is 0.21.0 and Testbox requires >=0.22.0; PR CI is the broad proof source.
target.author: steipete

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
